Document:
# Core Rule 5 - Multi-Accounting / Multikeying
Multikeying is not allowed on our servers.
This means that you may not have multiple accounts on our servers, and you may not play with multiple characters at the same time.
If you are found to be multikeying, all of your accounts will be banned.
## Examples
### Permitted
- Never Permitted
### Not Permitted
- Logging in with multiple accounts at the same time. - Using an alternate account to bypass a ban.
